one_time_description: Prior period adjustment: tuition fees from School District 72 nominal roll were understated for Q4 of fiscal year 2020, restating accumulated surplus downward by $246,963
economic_notes: Nation has significant commercial enterprise portfolio including forestry, fisheries, marine terminals, liquor store, service station, resort, campsites, hotel, and shake mill operations. GBEs had combined revenue of $35,716,027 and net income of $3,291,632 in 2021. Subsequent event: approved loan of $355,000 and funding of $125,000 from TACC for commercial recreational complex construction.
notes: Fiscal year 2021, not 2024. Nation has a large portfolio of GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (16 entities). Three entities consolidated line-by-line: Quinsam Properties BT Inc., Quinsam Reserve Leasing Inc., and 1223053 BC Ltd. Prior period adjustment of $246,963 restated 2020 comparative figures. Segment disclosure shows wages and benefits of $2,178,351 which differs from Schedule of Expenses by Object figure of $2,070,035 — difference likely due to segment allocation methodology. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $5,744,692 + Province of BC $1,126,113 + First Nation Health Authority $292,522 + CMHC $77,397 + NVIAETS $112,685 + Kwakiutl District Council $85,000 + FNESC $186,822 = $7,624,231. No schedule of remuneration provided.
